scripts.package: rm -f vimdocs-extension.zip && python3 -c "import os, zipfile; z = zipfile.ZipFile('vimdocs-extension.zip', 'w'); [z.write(os.path.join(r, f)) for d in ['HAVE_SRC', 'HAVE_ICONS'] for r, _, fs in os.walk(d.replace('HAVE_', '').lower()) for f in fs]; [z.write(f) for f in ['manifest.json', 'options.html', 'options.js'] if os.path.exists(f)]"
